scripts.verify:packages: pnpm typecheck:packages && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:memories && pnpm test:creador
scripts.build:production: pnpm build:memories && pnpm build:creador && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:copilot
scripts.test:e2e:app:ver:local: E2E_HEADED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER=webkit E2E_DELAY_BEFORE=8000 E2E_SLOW=1 BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8080 playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts e2e-app/smoke.spec.ts --headed
